auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to JobFlow to use credits and scraping.
auth.registerSubtitle: Start free — upgrade anytime for AI and scrape.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your account email and we’ll send a link to reset your password.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter a new password for your JobFlow account.

account.title: Account
account.changePasswordHint: Use your current password, then choose a new one (at least 8 characters).

home.headline: Land your dream job
home.subtitle: Start free with one resume, cover letter, portfolio, and local keyword ATS. Upgrade to Pro for job scrape, Gemini AI, and unlimited projects.

features.resumeDesc: Build and export polished resumes on Free. Pro unlocks AI tailoring and keyword-matched drafts for each role.
features.coverDesc: Write and save a cover letter on Free. Pro generates personalized letters aligned to the job description.
features.atsDesc: Free local keyword coverage against any job description. Pro adds deep AI ATS analysis and fixes.
features.scraperDesc: Pro: extract requirements from job boards and match them against your profile in one click.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need AI and scrape.

metrics.label: Include metrics / numbers
metrics.hint: Off by default. Leave off for roles where quantification doesn’t fit. Applies to AI draft, enhance, and ATS fix.
